lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: Whisper an idea. I'll show you the rest.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: Tell me what you'd build. I'll bring the light.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: Stephen had one rule: build what you'd be proud to sign.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: One craftsman. One rule. Sign what you ship.

lines.speaker: company
lines.text: Most software dies in the gap between sketch and ship. We close it.
lines.notes: split: 'Most software dies in the gap between sketch and ship.' (10w) + 'We close it.' (3w) — multi-beat per FR-CMS-002 §3.2

lines.speaker: company
lines.text: Sketch to ship — the gap is where projects die. We close it.
lines.notes: split: 'Sketch to ship — the gap is where projects die.' (9w) + 'We close it.' (3w)

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: React, Three.js, AI, design systems — four hands of the same craft.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: Four disciplines. One mind. One mark on every line.

lines.speaker: company
lines.text: Ten of us. All senior. All Vietnamese. All remote.

lines.speaker: company
lines.text: Ten people. No juniors. No agencies behind us.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: From Sài Gòn to your time zone.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: Sài Gòn at dusk. Your zone at dawn. One light between.

lines.speaker: company
lines.text: You bring the will. We bring the real.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.notes: Companion to wave_goodbye animation (master plan §3.3a). Soft close.

lines.speaker: lumi
lines.text: Lumi — light that turns wishes into truth.
lines.notes: Hover-reveal tagline; VI counterpart in vi.json renders for vi locale. Master plan §1.1.
